title: The Problems Arising from the Lack of Explainability in AI Governance: The RisCanvi Use Case
description_es: Este artículo examina los problemas que surgen de la falta de explicabilidad en sistemas de IA para gobernanza, utilizando el sistema RisCanvi de evaluación de riesgo como caso de estudio.
abstract: AI governance systems in critical domains require explainability for accountability and trust. This paper analyzes the problems arising from lack of explainability in AI governance through the RisCanvi case study - a risk assessment system used in judicial contexts. We identify key explainability gaps and propose requirements for governable AI systems in sensitive applications.

citations.apa: Mentxaka, O., López-Montilla, J., Urrutia-Onate, D., Almazrouei, H., & Herrera, F. (2026). The Problems Arising from the Lack of Explainability in AI Governance: The RisCanvi Use Case. AI & Society.
citations.mla: Mentxaka, Oier, Jesús López-Montilla, D. Urrutia-Onate, H. Almazrouei, and Francisco Herrera. "The Problems Arising from the Lack of Explainability in AI Governance: The RisCanvi Use Case." AI & Society, 2026.
